Scenario
0 operations Click to select · Drag cell → cell to swap · Ctrl+Click to add · Click row/lane headers to select all · Right-click for menu
🎯 PLACE MODE — Click any cell to assign the new lane there. Press Esc or click here to cancel.
Click a cell to inspect its details
Select a cell to add notes

Document why you made this change (visible to OPS + MFO)

✓ Saved

+ Add New Lane

Define the route, then click a cell on the grid to place it.

✏ Set Filter on Selected Cells

Apply a stacking filter to all selected cells at once.

💾 Save Scenario

Save your current layout as a named scenario to compare later.

TCY5 Floor Layout Designer

What is this tool?

A shared workspace for MFO Engineers and OPS Managers to plan floor layout changes. Drag chutes, annotate decisions, compare scenarios, and export documented proposals — all from one page.

🖱 Mouse Actions

Click — select a cell

Ctrl+Click — add to selection

Click+Drag — lasso select (works anywhere)

Click Row/Lane header — select entire row or lane

Right-click — context menu (swap, clear, etc.)

⌨ Keyboard Shortcuts

Ctrl+Z Undo

Ctrl+A Select all

Esc Deselect / cancel

Del Clear selected

🏷 Change Tracking Badges

SWAP Two cells swapped NEW New lane placed CLR Cell cleared MOD Bulk edit

Changed cells show "was: ..." so you can see the original value at a glance.

📊 Bottom Panels

Change Proposal — auto-generated table of every proposed change with notes

Impact Analysis — ADV shifts per lane, total changes, type flips

Activity Log — chronological history of every operation
